title: Docs Polish
summary: Improve onboarding docs so a new user understands what to do next.
task_template: Improve documentation usefulness for: {task}. Inspect onboarding, examples, command accuracy, and user journey in scope: {scope}.
context: Expected outcome: confusing sections, missing examples, inaccurate commands, and recommended documentation edits.
outcome: A practical documentation improvement plan grounded in user tasks.
next_steps: Use findings to update README, getting started docs, and examples.
Verify every documented command still works.
